features.name: Danger Sense
features.desc: Advantage on DEX saves you can see. Not blinded, deafened, or incapacitated.

features.name: Reckless Attack
features.desc: Advantage on STR melee attacks this turn; attacks against you have advantage until next turn.

features.name: Primal Knowledge
features.desc: Gain proficiency in one skill from the Barbarian list.

features.name: Fast Movement
features.desc: +10 ft speed while not wearing heavy armor.

features.name: Feral Instinct
features.desc: Advantage on Initiative. If surprised, you can act normally if you enter Rage.

features.name: Instinctive Pounce
features.desc: Move up to half speed when entering Rage.

features.name: Brutal Strike
features.desc: Once per turn while raging, Reckless Attack deals extra 1d10 damage and can push or knock prone.

features.name: Relentless Rage
features.desc: If you drop to 0 HP while raging, CON save DC 10 to drop to 1 HP instead. DC increases by 5 each time.

features.name: Improved Brutal Strike
features.desc: Brutal Strike damage increases. New options: Staggering Blow or Sundering Blow.

features.name: Persistent Rage
features.desc: Rage no longer ends early unless you choose to end it or are incapacitated.

features.name: Improved Brutal Strike
features.desc: Brutal Strike extra damage increases to 2d10.

features.name: Indomitable Might
features.desc: If your STR check total is less than your STR score, use your STR score instead.

features.name: Epic Boon
features.desc: Gain an Epic Boon feat or another feat of your choice.

features.name: Primal Champion
features.desc: STR and CON scores increase by 4. Maximum for those scores is now 25.
